name: Oracle
description: I have an end in mind for you.

abilities.name: Prognosticate
abilities.description: Accurately predicts where the next will spawn.

abilities.name: Clairvoyant Curse
abilities.description: Grants Oracle bonus outgoing spell damage amplification per hero level.

abilities.name: Clairvoyant Cure
abilities.description: Grants Oracle bonus outgoing heal amplification per hero level.

abilities.name: Fortune's End
abilities.description: Applies a basic dispel only on the unit-targeted allied unit upon projectile impact. Applies a buff that continously basic dispels corresponding to the max channel time.

abilities.name: Fate's Edict
abilities.description: Enraptures the affected unit, disarms and set its magic resistance to the max value.

abilities.name: Purifying Flames
abilities.description: Deals damage to the affected unit before causing them to heal over time. The damage increasing talent does not increase the damage applied to allied units.

abilities.name: Rain of Destiny
abilities.description: Bring forth rain that damage and applies an incoming heal reduction for all affected enemy units within an area-targeted location.

abilities.name: False Promise
abilities.description: When, applies one heal instance to the affected allied unit based on the remaining summed heal value. When, the remaining damage (or the negative heal value) is applied as one damage instance. Grants the kill credit to the damage instance that would have killed if they applied in order.
